verification_note: CLI verification on 2026-06-06: the original PMID 36929942 resolved in the UI but failed the CLI full-text fetch path, so it was replaced with PMID 39009607. The replacement was verified by PMC efetch from PMC11250857 with 61,679 chars and quality 0.90. Keep this revised PMID list fixed for every formal free-tier timing run.

rules: Use the same PMIDs for every study run.
Prefer PMC/Europe PMC open-access full text.
Exclude papers that require OCR, Playwright fallback, or figure analysis to be useful.
Replace any candidate that cannot be fetched consistently before the study starts.
